goal: 让 Catty shadow 写入默认拒绝 repeated-context

summary.title: 拒绝重复上下文 shadow 写入
summary.what: 让 Catty shadow 的受控写入入口在 samplingFreshness.status 为 repeated-context 时默认拒绝写入，并新增 --allow-repeated-context 作为人工例外开关。补充 shadow focused test，确认默认拒绝不会追加第二条 prediction，显式允许后才会写入；同时更新 src/catty/README.md 的命令说明和边界说明。
summary.why: live dogfood 当前停在同一个 Chrome localhost 上下文，继续重复写 shadow 样本只会堆重复样本，不能推进 user-prior candidate 或 canary。上一轮已经有 repeated-context 诊断和 dogfood-health 推荐降级，本轮把诊断升级成写入前防污染 guard，但仍保留人工 override 供刻意例外。
summary.user_goal: 让 Catty shadow 写入默认拒绝 repeated-context

decisions.chose: 当 --write 遇到 repeated-context 时先拒绝，再要求 --allow-repeated-context 才能写入。
decisions.rationale: 这把防污染放在唯一会产生 catty_predictions 副作用的入口前，避免长期 goal 在同一 live surface 上反复堆样本。

decisions.chose: 保持 dry-run 完全可用，继续输出 samplingFreshness 和 hypothesis。
decisions.rationale: 等待真实上下文切换期间仍需要只读诊断；防污染只约束写入，不影响观察。

decisions.chose: 使用显式 --allow-repeated-context 和 allowRepeatedContext 选项作为人工例外，而不是完全禁止重复上下文。
decisions.rationale: v0 仍是手动 dogfood 阶段，保留少量人工例外有助于调试，同时让默认路径安全。

rejected.alternative: 继续只给 repeated-context 诊断但允许默认写入
rejected.reason: 当前 live truth 已显示同一上下文反复采样，诊断不足以防止误操作写入噪音样本。

rejected.alternative: 彻底禁止 repeated-context 写入
rejected.reason: 人工调试或刻意采样仍可能需要例外；显式 override 比硬禁止更符合 v0 手动控制阶段。

review_notes: TDD RED：bun test src/catty/shadow.test.ts 先失败，原因是第二次 write resolved 而不是拒绝 repeated-context。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/shadow.test.ts，4 pass。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts，79 pass。
验证通过：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check。
live smoke：bun src/catty/shadow.ts --limit 80 仍为 dry-run，显示 samplingFreshness.status=repeated-context。
live smoke：bun src/catty/shadow.ts --write 在当前 repeated-context 下以退出码 2 拒绝，并提示 --allow-repeated-context。
runtime 回读：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 显示 heartbeat OK，full pipeline 正常 throttled。
Mainline overlap 分类：int_39b41008/int_6ba06425 是本切片前置诊断和推荐降级；本轮是明确的顺序增强，不改变 heartbeat、memory admission、judge 或 canary 协议。
未触碰无关 dirty 文件 CLAUDE.md；seal 使用 --allow-dirty 记录既有 dirty 状态。

architectural_claims: Catty shadow write path now treats repeated-context as a write-time pollution risk, not only as a diagnostic.
The guard is local to the manual shadow CLI/runtime seam and does not attach model calls or writes to launchd heartbeat.
The accepted override is explicit and operator-driven, preserving manual dogfood control while making the default safe.
behavioral_changes: recordCattyShadowPrediction({ write: true }) now throws on repeated-context unless allowRepeatedContext is true.
bun src/catty/shadow.ts --write now exits with an error on repeated-context unless --allow-repeated-context is supplied.
Dry-run shadow inspection still returns samplingFreshness and hypothesis without writing catty_predictions.
The CLI help and README document the repeated-context default refusal and override flag.

api_changes.signature: recordCattyShadowPrediction(options) now accepts allowRepeatedContext?: boolean and refuses repeated-context writes by default

security_implications: The guard reduces accidental live DB writes for already-sampled contexts.
No secrets are read or printed; --pi still remains explicit and no model call is made before the repeated-context write refusal path reaches brain.propose.
migration_notes: No schema migration is required; the behavior uses existing samplingFreshness computed from catty_predictions.
